creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, Apr 30, 2008 at 10:54:39AM -0400, Jon Nistor wrote:
> .. Updates and creates RRD databases using librrd. Step, heartbeat
> and archives can be freely configured.
> 
> 
> Hrm damn eh, didn't even notice that one, good catch!  I would imagine that 
> the default should be no based on what this program is generally designed 
> to do.

So don't even bother with it, or make it user-configurable with an
OPTION?

-- WXS
